{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing agent-based V2G simulators.",
    "R1.7": "Fails to identify any missing or incorrect citations.",
    "RX.1": "Does not differentiate uncertainty levels for different claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions but could benefit from a more precise description of the simulated feeder and its characteristics.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the output appears to be safe and avoids introducing harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Lacks traceability for most changes made to the original text."

    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing agent-based V2G simulators.
rationale.R1.7: Fails to identify any missing or incorrect citations.
rationale.RX.1: Does not differentiate uncertainty levels for different claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions but could benefit from a more precise description of the simulated feeder and its characteristics.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the output appears to be safe and avoids introducing harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Lacks traceability for most changes made to the original text.
